channel.title: About on Will Leeson
channel.description: Recent content in About on Will Leeson

item.title: Teaching
item.description: Teaching Assistant CS4620 - Compilers (Fall 2020) Graded quizzes and projects Held office hours twice a week to assist students Assisted in building example compiler students were tasked with extending CS6888 - Software Analysis and Applications (Spring 2021) Graded projects and homework assignments Developed in-class assignments and exam questions Held office hours twice a week to assist students Lectured on formal verification
